title: McPvP Splashes
description:
Remember McPvP? Me too! 
This is a texture/resource pack that adds 250+ splash texts related to this legendary server that ruled the early stages of Minecraft!
body:
#  McPvP Splashes

## By RodrigoTR

McPvP was a big part of many players lives many years ago, why not add some flair dedicated to it to your game?

This texture pack adds more than 250+ custom splashes that make you feel nostalgic about those times!

To make it work just add it over any other texture pack you have installed, since this only contains custom splashes and nothing more if needed for older versions of the game you can safely merge them.
